pure_text: |finos::trdx::Trade.all()->project(~[tradeId: t|$t.tradeId, desk: t|$t.desk, region: t|$t.region, notional: t|$t.notional])->extend(over(~desk), ~[agg:{p,w,r|$r.notional}:y|$y->sum()])

|dataEngineering::gmdServices::clientRevenue::consumers::gcDailyAgg::domain::GrossCreditsDailyAggExtended.all()->filter(x|$x.TRADE_DATE.fiscalWeekOffset >= -3)->filter(x|$x.TRADE_DATE.fiscalWeekOffset <= 0)->project(~[Week: x|$x.TRADE_DATE.fiscalWeekOffset, Segment: x|$x.FACET_DATA(%latest, %latest).clientSegment.defaultClientSegment.clientSegmentLevel1, GC: x|$x.REVENUE.netRevenueExPcc])->groupBy(~[Week, Segment], ~'Gross Credits': x|$x.GC : y|$y->sum())->sort([ascending(~Segment), ascending(~Week)])

|GC::Model.all()->project(~[K: x|$x.emp.kerberos, GC: x|$x.rev.net])->groupBy(~K, ~'Total': x|$x.GC : y|$y->sum())->join(GC::Model.all()->project(~[K2: x|$x.emp.kerberos, IID: x|$x.interactions.ID])->groupBy(~K2, ~'Cnt': x|$x.IID : y|$y->distinct()->count()), JoinKind.INNER, {a,b|$a.K == $b.K2})->select(~[K, 'Total', 'Cnt'])->filter(x|$x.'Cnt' > 100)

|GC::Model.all()->filter(x|$x.date->year() == 2025)->project(~[C: x|$x.FACET(%latest,%latest).seg.name, GC: x|$x.rev.net])->groupBy(~C, ~'Total': x|$x.GC : y|$y->sum())->join(GC::Model.all()->filter(x|$x.date->year()==2025)->project(~[C2: x|$x.FACET(%latest,%latest).seg.name, MID: x|$x.interactions->filter(i|$i.Type==Type.Meeting).ID])->groupBy(~C2, ~M: x|$x.MID : y|$y->distinct()->count()), JoinKind.INNER, {a,b|$a.C == $b.C2})

|GC::Model.all()->project(~[All: x|'all', C: x|$x.client.name, GC: x|$x.rev.net])->groupBy(~[All, C], ~'ClientGC': x|$x.GC : y|$y->sum())->extend(over(~All), ~'Grand': {p,w,r|$r.'ClientGC'} : y|$y->sum())
